name: Kingsmen C.M.T.I. Public Company Limited
summary: Kingsmen C.M.T.I. Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in interior design and decoration, and exhibition businesses in Thailand. It offers retail and corporate interior services, including retail interiors, roll-outs, retail fixtures, corporate interiors, and restaurants; exhibitions and event services, such as custom-designed stands, official shows, pavilions, suites and chalets, and rental services; thematic and museums comprising theme parks and attractions, galleries and visitor centers, and museums; and event management services. Kingsmen C.M.T.I. Public Company Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
